        About this item

        • Glass
        • 【Oversized Full-Length Mirror】This full body mirror delivers a clear head-to-toe reflection with distortion-free glass. It’s a practical must-have and stylish decor upgrade for your bedroom, living room, closet, home gym and more
        • 【Shatterproof & Long-Lasting Quality】Built with nano tempered glass and a solid aluminum alloy frame, this floor mirror is stronger and safer than ordinary glass. It’s shatter-resistant, fade-proof, and durable, ensuring years of crystal-clear reflection without worry.
        • 【Three Placement Options】Enjoy maximum flexibility—stand it upright on the floor, lean it casually against the wall, or mount it securely to save space. A complete screw kit is included, making it easy to adapt the mirror to your room and lifestyle.
        • 【Ready to Use, No Assembly Needed】Skip complicated setups—this bedroom floor mirror arrives fully assembled and ready to use. Its lightweight yet sturdy frame allows you to move it effortlessly, giving you the freedom to refresh your room layout whenever you like.
        • 【Modern Design, Space-Saving Style】With its slim profile and minimalist frame, this mirror blends seamlessly into any décor. It adds both function and elegance to your space, making it an eye-catching accent while maximizing room efficiency.
        › See more product details

        Product description

        • I rent an 8㎡ studio apartment—what size works best?

          We recommend the 55.5" L×14.6" W medium size. At 55.5" tall, it covers heights up to 6.2' easily. It's our most popular size (great for bedrooms/living rooms)!

        • I'm 6.1' tall—what size shows my full body?

          We recommend the 55.5" L×14.6" W medium size. At 55.5" tall, it covers heights up to 6.2' easily. It's our most popular size (great for bedrooms/living rooms)!

        • I have a walk-in closet and want a "luxury-looking" large mirror—what should I pick?

          The 71" L ×26" W oversized size is made for this! It's 26" wide and 71" long, capable of showing full outfits, making your closet look bigger!

        • Where does the 64.4" L ×23.4" W size fit best?

          This size is great for open-concept studios or master bedrooms! It's wider than the medium size, so it works as both a full-length mirror and a statement decor piece (try it next to a sofa or vanity).

        • Are the installation methods the same for all sizes?

          Most sizes support both floor-standing and wall-mounting. The 46.6" size is better for floor placement (space-saving), while the 71" oversize pairs best with a floor stand (sturdier). All sizes come with mounting hardware for beginners.

        How customer reviews and ratings work

        Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

        To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

        Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon
        Sponsored

        Customers say

        Customers find the mirror to be of great quality, with one noting its modern appeal with the arch and metal design. Moreover, the size is perfect for a full outfit view, and customers appreciate its sturdiness with no stability issues. Additionally, the mirror is easy to assemble, comes pre-assembled, and provides a clear full-body view. However, opinions about image distortion are mixed, with some customers reporting no distortion while others find it distorted.

        "Purchased for my son's room. Beautiful mirror. No assembly required. He picked black. Ready right out box. Lean or hang options. Would buy again." Read more
        "This mirror looks great and is sturdy. Mirror quality is good and it’s easy to clean." Read more

        "Great value! It’s sturdy, functional, and looks nice in our room. I’m glad we opted for this size over the smaller one...." Read more
        "...This mirror is affordable and lightweight but very sturdy. There are no waves or ripples in the image. I would definitely buy it again." Read more
        "Perfect standing mirror definitely worth the price!..." Read more

        "...The gold aluminum frame looks classy and modern, adding a nice touch without feeling bulky or heavy...." Read more
        "I don't know what part of this mirror is "shatter proof" but it certainly isn't the glass part, big box of broken glass is what I got so I hope you..." Read more
        "...a mirror then it would be good choice but if you are looking for a sturdy mirror, you may want to check the weight and your options." Read more
        60 customers mention ease of assembly, 58 positive, 2 negative60 customers mention "Ease of assembly"58 positive2 negative
        Customers find the mirror easy to assemble and mount, with one mentioning it comes ready to use right out of the box.
        "...The mirror was easy set up literally pull out the box and put it up and it is not thick or heavy so it was perfect and easy. I 100% recommend." Read more
        "Arrived quickly and well packaged. Absolutely no damage. Easy to set up (stand is already installed) and great size and quality for the price!" Read more
        "Purchased for my son's room. Beautiful mirror. No assembly required. He picked black. Ready right out box. Lean or hang options. Would buy again." Read more
        "...I hung it over the bedroom door. It was easy to install, and the reflection is clear and not distorted...." Read more
        54 customers mention clarity, 45 positive, 9 negative54 customers mention "Clarity"45 positive9 negative
        Customers praise the mirror's clarity, noting that it provides a full view and allows them to see themselves clearly from head to toe.
        "Let me tell you run!!!! And buy this it's so clear and beautiful I have it placed in my living room...." Read more
        "...The reflection is crystal clear with no distortion, and the frame feels very high-quality...." Read more
        "Beautiful, high quality mirror. Does not distort image and it is very clear and lovely. Would buy again." Read more
        "The mirror itself has a clear reflection. The gold framing adds an elegant touch...." Read more
        69 customers mention distorted image, 33 positive, 36 negative69 customers mention "Distorted image"33 positive36 negative
        Customers have mixed experiences with the mirror's image quality, with some reporting no distortion and no warping, while others mention issues with distortion and warping.
        "Horrible mirror. Looks like a fun house mirror. Distorted, makes you look short and wide. Absolutely dissatisfied and disappointed...." Read more
        "Perfect. Arrived well packaged. There is no distortion. Just open the box and set it up. The mirror sits well on the floor brace. Stable and sturdy...." Read more
        "...It really is a great looking mirror. Easy set up. Sadly, the mirror is distorted...." Read more
        "Not warped but does not get clean. I sprayed it 3 times with 2 different cleaners and tried a paper towel and microfiber cloth and nothing worked...." Read more

        5 out of 5 stars
        Perfect for a small space
        Due to space in my bedroom I only have one nightstand, and this mirror perfectly balances out the room! I used to have mirror closet doors and I changed those out so I didn't have a full length mirror and this works perfect!

        Product Summary: DUMOS Arched Full Length Mirror with Stand Floor Standing Aluminum Frame for Bedroom Body Hanging Leaning Modern Simple Home Decor Shatter-Proorf Nano Glass Wall Living Room Cloakroom Black 56"x15"

        From DUMOS

        4.6 out of 5 stars, 2,357 ratings

        Purchasing options

        Other sellers

        Other sellers

        About this Item

        • Glass
        • 【Oversized Full-Length Mirror】This full body mirror delivers a clear head-to-toe reflection with distortion-free glass. It’s a practical must-have and stylish decor upgrade for your bedroom, living room, closet, home gym and more
        • 【Shatterproof & Long-Lasting Quality】Built with nano tempered glass and a solid aluminum alloy frame, this floor mirror is stronger and safer than ordinary glass. It’s shatter-resistant, fade-proof, and durable, ensuring years of crystal-clear reflection without worry.
        • 【Three Placement Options】Enjoy maximum flexibility—stand it upright on the floor, lean it casually against the wall, or mount it securely to save space. A complete screw kit is included, making it easy to adapt the mirror to your room and lifestyle.
        • 【Ready to Use, No Assembly Needed】Skip complicated setups—this bedroom floor mirror arrives fully assembled and ready to use. Its lightweight yet sturdy frame allows you to move it effortlessly, giving you the freedom to refresh your room layout whenever you like.
        • 【Modern Design, Space-Saving Style】With its slim profile and minimalist frame, this mirror blends seamlessly into any décor. It adds both function and elegance to your space, making it an eye-catching accent while maximizing room efficiency.

        Product Description

        This full body mirror comes 100% ready to use right out of the box—no complicated assembly required, saving you precious time and effort for instant home use. Boasting dual versatile installation, it can be effortlessly hung on any wall or freely stood upright anywhere, adapting perfectly to your space layout and usage needs, making daily home life far more convenient and comfortable while showcasing a minimalist, stylish taste of life that elevates your home decor. Designed with an ultra-wide angle viewing area, it captures your entire figure in one shot with no cropping, ideal for daily dressing, outfit checks and even selfie or photo shoots; you’ll enjoy a flawless head-to-toe presentation, with every detail of your look, accessories and fit clearly visible, so you’ll never miss a single detail again. The mirror is sturdy, durable and long-lasting for years of reliable use, with no easy wear, scratch or damage in daily use—practical and high-quality, it not only serves as a functional home essential but also delivers a superior, seamless wearing and styling experience every time you use it, blending practicality and durability for a worthwhile home investment.

        Important Information

        Safety Information

        Always place the mirror on a stable, level surface. For added safety, secure the mirror to the wall using the included hardware and screws.
